build.beforeDevCommand: npm run prepare-sidecar -w @claude-code-provider-gateway/desktop && npm run dev -w @claude-code-provider-gateway/panel
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build -w @claude-code-provider-gateway/panel && npm run prepare-sidecar -w @claude-code-provider-gateway/desktop

bundle.shortDescription: Local desktop gateway for Claude Code provider routing.
bundle.longDescription: Claude Code Provider Gateway is a local-first desktop app that routes Claude Code through OpenAI Account, GitHub Copilot, OpenRouter, local models, and other OpenAI or Anthropic-compatible providers.
